headline: Buffett Steps Aside: Abel's First Berkshire 13F Buys Delta Air Lines, Exits Visa And Mastercard
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B) is no longer run by Warren Buffett, with Greg Abel as CEO. New positions in Delta, Macy's, Alphabet C. Exits include Visa, Mastercard, UnitedHealth, Domino's, Aon, Pool, Amazon, Heico, Formula One.

headline: Aon Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Aon has underperformed the broader market over the past year, though analysts remain moderately optimistic about the company’s long-term growth outlook and earnings resilience.

headline: Analysts Raise Aon Plc (AON) Target Price After Earnings Beat
summary: Aon plc (NYSE:AON) is one of the Best 52-Week Low Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 11, Keefe Bruyette raised its price target on Aon plc (NYSE:AON) to $404 from $401 and reaffirmed an Outperform rating on the stock. The firm’s adjusted price target suggests a further 29% upside from the current […]
